title: Crutch sheep
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Crutch sheep demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for crutching operations

pcs.text: Access crutching equipment to prepare for correct operation prior to commencing work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access crutching equipment to prepare for correct operation prior to commencing work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access crutching equipment to prepare for correct operation prior to commencing work.

pcs.text: Communicate with team members to identify potential and existing hazards in the workplace and report to the supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate with team members to identify potential and existing hazards in the workplace and report to the supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with team members to identify potential and existing hazards in the workplace and report to the supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, use and maintain suitable personal protective equipment (PPE) and ensure correct fit
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, use and maintain suitable personal protective equipment (PPE) and ensure correct fit?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, use and maintain suitable personal protective equipment (PPE) and ensure correct fit.

pcs.text: Identify, catch and move sheep to be crutched in line with work health and safety (WHS), industry and animal welfare standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, catch and move sheep to be crutched in line with work health and safety (WHS), industry and animal welfare standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, catch and move sheep to be crutched in line with work health and safety (WHS), industry and animal welfare standards.

pcs.text: Position sheep for crutching in a manner that complies with animal welfare standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Position sheep for crutching in a manner that complies with animal welfare standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Position sheep for crutching in a manner that complies with animal welfare standards.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for crutching operations

elements.title: Perform crutching operations

pcs.text: Activate handpiece and position in readiness for crutching
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Activate handpiece and position in readiness for crutching?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Activate handpiece and position in readiness for crutching.

pcs.text: Shear wool from face, crutch or belly as instructed within the allocated time period
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Shear wool from face, crutch or belly as instructed within the allocated time period?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Shear wool from face, crutch or belly as instructed within the allocated time period.

pcs.text: Use crutching methods to ensure that injury to the sheep and damage to the fleece are avoided
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use crutching methods to ensure that injury to the sheep and damage to the fleece are avoided?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use crutching methods to ensure that injury to the sheep and damage to the fleece are avoided.

pcs.text: Use safe handling techniques at all times
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use safe handling techniques at all times?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use safe handling techniques at all times.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Perform crutching operations

elements.title: Respond to complications

pcs.text: Identify contamination during crutching and report to wool handlers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify contamination during crutching and report to wool handlers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify contamination during crutching and report to wool handlers.

pcs.text: Treat cuts as required according to WHS and animal welfare standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Treat cuts as required according to WHS and animal welfare standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Treat cuts as required according to WHS and animal welfare standards.

pcs.text: Identify and report flyblown sheep according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report flyblown sheep according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report flyblown sheep according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify and report sheep that have a health and welfare problem according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report sheep that have a health and welfare problem according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report sheep that have a health and welfare problem according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Respond to complications

elements.title: Complete crutching operations

pcs.text: Place wool appropriately to avoid contamination and for wool handlers to collect
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place wool appropriately to avoid contamination and for wool handlers to collect?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place wool appropriately to avoid contamination and for wool handlers to collect.

pcs.text: Switch off handpiece and re-position to non-operational position
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Switch off handpiece and re-position to non-operational position?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Switch off handpiece and re-position to non-operational position.

pcs.text: Release sheep safely from the board into the count-out pens
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Release sheep safely from the board into the count-out pens?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Release sheep safely from the board into the count-out pens.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report crutching issues to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report crutching issues to supervisor.

pcs.text: Tally crutched sheep count in line with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Tally crutched sheep count in line with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Tally crutched sheep count in line with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Follow workplace environment and biosecurity policies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace environment and biosecurity policies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace environment and biosecurity policies.
